subcodes.first_line: O erudite teacher in the school of inner meanings, your memory abides with the friends and is the solace of troubled hearts. You shall never be forgotten [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ادیب دبستان معانی یادت همدم یارانست و مونس دلهای پریشان آنی فراموش نمی شوی
subcodes.subjects: @relationship between government and people, @justice ['adl]; social justice and divine justice, @thankfulness; gratitude, @laws of God; of the Kitab-i-Aqdas
